name: push-two-phase-lock
description: pushToGitHub two-phase lock: ghCreate (network) runs OUTSIDE the file lock; writeback re-reads inside withLock and re-checks githubNumber to defend concurrent push race. Track wroteSuccessfully and orphanedThisIteration as closure vars.

name: dry-run-before-gh-check
description: For testability: pushToGitHub checks dryRun and returns BEFORE calling ghIsAvailable(). This makes --push --dry-run reachable in tests without gh auth — the only viable test path when no gh mock infra exists. Pattern: early-exit dry-run before any external dependency check.

name: push-result-sentinel
description: pushToGitHub returns null (not {pushed:0}) for not-configured/gh-unavailable short-circuits. Caller gates JSON key inclusion on pushResult !== null, not on push flag. Prevents polluting existing JSON contract when push pass never ran.
